descriptions.languageCourses: Mandarin and English courses for students
descriptions.hr: Employees, leaves, payroll and daily reports

employees.title: Employees
employees.confirmDeleteDesc: {name} will be removed from the lists. Their history (leaves, payslips, reports) is preserved and can be restored.

form.callTrackingEnabledHint: The employee fills the 6 call counters in their daily reports.
form.callQuotaHint: Assessed against the 300 calls / 90 appointments weekly quota (also enables counters).

employees.pinSentBoth: PIN sent by email and SMS
employees.pinHiddenHint: PIN is hashed on the server. Click Regenerate to obtain a new PIN to share.

payroll.title: Payslips
payroll.description: Monthly salary generation — automatically creates a "salaries" expense in accounting

email.noEmail: No email address on file for this employee
email.error: Failed to send the payslip by email

payroll.generateHint: Creates payslips due for the configured schedules (and a pending accounting expense)
payroll.modeAutoHint: Honors schedules: only generates if the payment date has arrived and the month hasn't been processed yet.
payroll.modeTargetHint: Pick a specific month/year. Bypasses the date guard so you can generate ahead of time or back-fill a missed month. Existing payslips for the same employee/month are never duplicated.

adjustments.title: Bonuses & deductions
adjustments.empty: No bonus or deduction. Click "Add line".

config.title: Payroll configuration
config.description: Deduction rules, payment schedules, recurring bonuses and custom salaries

rules.confirmDeleteDesc: Rule "{label}" will be removed. Already-applied deductions are not affected.

schedules.dayHint: If the day exceeds the end of the month (e.g. 31 in February), payroll will be generated on the last day.
schedules.confirmDeleteDesc: Schedule "{label}" will be removed. Already-generated payslips are preserved.

payConfigs.hint: Custom salary overrides base salary. Recurring bonuses are added to every auto-generated payslip.

evaluationsOverview.title: Performance index — global view
evaluationsOverview.description: Ranking of employees by performance index, derived from ratings and daily reports
evaluationsOverview.indexHint: Index /100 = 70% ratings + 30% reports (consistency: number of reports and hours worked). Employees without an account, and those with only one of the two sources, are included with a partial index.
evaluationsOverview.empty: No data (rating or report) for this period

detail.deductionHint: Record employee misconduct here. It will be automatically included in the next auto-generated payslip.
detail.noRulesYet: Configure a rule first in the Configuration tab.
detail.confirmDeleteDeductionDesc: This deduction (not yet on a payslip) will be removed.

history.title: Employee history
history.empty: No event recorded for this employee.

evaluations.hint: Rate the employee on each criterion (1 to 5). The overall rating is the average of the criteria.
evaluations.callPerfEmpty: No call reports for the selected period.
evaluations.confirmDeleteDesc: This evaluation will be permanently deleted.

required.title: Password change required
required.subtitle: Set a personal password before continuing
required.notice: Your temporary password must be replaced before you can access the application.

fields.hint: Minimum 8 characters, uppercase letter, number and symbol recommended

errors.currentRequired: Enter your current password before continuing.
errors.tooShort: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again, then try once more.
errors.accountCheck: Unable to verify your account. Sign in again, then try once more.
errors.updateFailed: The password could not be changed. Try again in a moment.
errors.defineFailed: The password could not be set. Try again in a moment.
errors.generic: An error occurred while changing the password.
errors.defineGeneric: An error occurred while updating the password.

notifications.updatedMessage: Your new password is now active.
notifications.activatedMessage: Your personal password has been saved. You can continue.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Access your space
login.errorDefault: Unable to connect. Check your credentials and try again.
login.forgotDescription: Enter your email (staff) or username (student) to receive your temporary credentials.
login.credentialsSentMessage: If an account exists, you received your username and temporary password. Log in then change your password.
login.emailSentMessage: If an account exists, you will receive a reset link valid for 24 hours.
login.noteStudent: First time? Use the username provided by your Joda agent.
login.noteTeam: Staff access only. Secure connection, encrypted and logged.
login.brandText: Students and team on a single platform — files, payments and guidance, all in one place.

dashboard.title: Admissions, revenue and risk management cockpit
dashboard.subtitle: Consolidated view to decide faster: application flow, university performance, collection capacity and operational alerts.

performance.title: Volume, admissions and cash over 6 months

risk.title: Operational pressure
risk.label: Alerts
risk.messageHigh: Priority on late payments and incomplete files to smooth out the current month.
risk.messageLow: No critical signal detected on payment flows and notifications.

programs.title: Most requested programs
programs.empty: Not enough files yet for the program mix.

nextActions.title: What the dashboard recommends now
nextActions.priorityText: Step up follow-ups on incomplete files and push universities with higher conversion rates.

confirm.generateDesc: This action adds fictional students, universities, applications and payments to enrich the cockpit.
confirm.clearDesc: This action cleans up demo data to return to a cleaner base.

highlights.topUniversity: {university} leads with {count} applications and {rate}% admission rate.
highlights.peakMonth: {month} is the peak collection month with {amount}.
highlights.noPeakMonth: No exploitable monthly collection trend yet.
highlights.latePayments: {count} payment(s) under tension require a quick follow-up.
highlights.noLatePayments: No critical payment detected in the current period.

header.title: User Management
header.description: Manage accounts, roles and platform permissions.

roleEditor.title: Permissions by role
roleEditor.description: Edit a role's default permissions. Applies to every account with that role (unless individually overridden).
roleEditor.configured: This role is customized: its permissions are defined here (no longer the code defaults).
roleEditor.usingDefaults: This role uses the default permissions. Any change here becomes its new configuration.
roleEditor.superAdminNote: Super Admin always keeps full access and cannot be edited.

create.title: Create a new user
create.description: The user will receive an email to confirm the account.
create.passwordHint: The user must change their password on first login.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.description: A temporary password will be generated and sent to {name}.
reset.hint: The user will receive their username and temporary password by email (and SMS if a phone number is registered). They must change it on first login.

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.description: Do you want to delete this user?
